title: Recycled Plastic ECO Euro Plastic Stacking Industrial Storage Containers Boxes Crates! (10 Litre - 40 x 30 x 12cm)

description: Recycled Plastic ECO Euro Plastic Stacking Industrial Storage Containers Boxes Crates! -– 17 Sizes - Lids Available Unique to the UK Market – Impeccable quality and industrial strength at excellent prices Made from 100% recycled polypropylene material - The ideal environmental solution to reduce the global impact of plastics High load capacity - Suitable for even the most heavy duty applications These containers are not food grade certified Innovative reinforced ribbed base design – Ability to stack on top of 2 x 400 x 300mm containers Closed and Open Handholes for easy manual handling when loaded Designed to European Container dimensions – Fit 5 per layer on 1200 x 1000mm on UK pallet or 4 per layer on 1200 x 800mm Euro Pallet Will Internal Sizeer-stack with all euro containers from major manufacturers Accessories available to make your life easier - Dollies for transportation and lids to keep contents secure ***Colour may vary due to containers being manufactured from recycled material***
